item.title: Entity or Value Object: that is the question
item.description: In Domain-Driven Design DDD, one of the key decisions you’ll encounter is whether a particular concept should be modeled as an Entity or a Value Objecthttps://www.domainl…

item.title: Introduction to Domain-Driven Design (DDD)
item.description: Designing software nowadays can be such a tough job, we know. Software complexity has raised and it is still raising reaching summits above the havoc. All this wave of fe…
